titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-fiḍ

text: ه عن محمّد بن الفيض فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن محمّد بن الفيض‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Fiḍ, I have narrated it from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Ibn Abi Umayr, from Muhammad ibn Al-Fiḍ.
